docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SORRENTINO, MICHAEL, OWNER CAL. THERMAL WINDOWS AS TO DEFENDANT YUEN, ELSIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
